steps.title: Identify the contradiction signal
steps.content: The passage states the long-held belief (humans arrived 13,000 years ago), then introduces new research suggesting 30,000 years—explicitly marked as “much earlier than previously thought.” This phrase signals a direct contradiction to the old view.

steps.title: Match the transition to the contradiction
steps.content: However transitions to contradictory information. The other three indicate causality, similarity, or conclusion—none of which fit. That matches choice C — C is correct.
